title: Osco Faux Leather Waste Bin – 12 Litre Round Waste Paper Basket – Stylish Leather Finish Bin for Home Office, Study, Bathroom, Desk – Easy Clean Surface – Compact & Elegant, Single, Light Taupe
features: DISCREET WASTE MANAGEMENT: This stylish faux leather waste bin offers a sleek, wipe-clean finish that discreetly contains rubbish in living rooms, offices, bedrooms or bathrooms while enhancing décor with elegant textured surface and contemporary round design.

PREMIUM MATERIAL FINISH: Constructed from high quality PU leather with detailed stitching and a waterproof inner lining, this bin resists spills, stains and wear. The faux leather exterior conceals contents while maintaining a premium look and long lasting durability.

PRACTICAL CAPACITY & SIZE: At 12 litres capacity and dimensions H290 × W260 × D260 mm with weight ~0.77 kg, this bin is compact yet functional. It accommodates typical daily waste without bulk, perfect for under desks, corners, bathrooms and bedrooms.

MULTI-ROOM VERSATILITY: Suitable for office, home, bathroom, study or bedside use, this bin fits discreetly while lending a touch of sophistication. Use identical bins across rooms for consistency in style. Ideal for replacing unsightly plastic bins with class.

TRUSTED UK BRAND QUALITY: OSCO is a UK based brand supplying retailers across the UK & Europe for over 25 years. Expect consistent quality, reliable customer care & design integrity. Pair with our matching organiser range to create a coordinated workspace aesthetic.
description: From the brand OSCO We offer an unrivalled range of high-grade affordable storage products for desktop, office and home.
